summary: Iteration 13: Backend testing of NEW 'Suggest Me' auto-suggestion engine (POST /api/implant-library/suggest-auto). All 17 tests PASSED (100% success rate). Verified: procedure-options returns 6 procedures + 4 bone types + compatibility dict, suggest-auto validates procedure+bone type compatibility (Sinus Lift with D1 warns, Immediate Implant with D4 warns), bone width/height correctly maps to diameter/length ranges, tooth restrictions correctly exclude NobelActive NP for tooth=46, existing endpoints unchanged.
critical_code_review_comments: PROCEDURE_BONE_COMPATIBILITY dict correctly implements 6 procedure types with bone type restrictions
suggest-auto endpoint validates all required fields (procedures, bone_type, bone_width>0, bone_height>0)
Bone height ranges correctly mapped: >=13→Long, >=10→Standard, >=8→Short, <8→Very short
Tooth restriction logic correct: implants with restricted_teeth are excluded if selected tooth not in list
validation_warnings correctly populated when procedure incompatible with bone type
valid_procedures field correctly filters out incompatible procedures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Suggest-auto engine fully tested. All procedure+bone type compatibility validations working. Diameter/length range calculations correct. Tooth restrictions filtering NobelActive NP and Osstem MS correctly. Existing /api/implant-library/suggest and /api/implant-library/systems endpoints unchanged.
